emails.subject: Re: black hills
emails.body: I wouldn't spend a bunch of time on them. Originally, the guy calls me up and says...you know we are looking to put in a gas turbine cogen and would like to know if Enron is interested in working with us......the thing is....the oilfield can't really pay anything for the steam....are you interested? Answer: NO!!!

emails.subject: black hills
emails.body: black hills Jim, Are you and or Steve Thome working with Black hills? Should we work with E= OL to get them online instead of rejected?=20 Kim Forwarded by Kim Ward/HOU/ECT on 04/05/2001 10:29 AM= Ami Thakkar@ENRON 04/05/2001 07:28 AM

emails.subject: Re: black hills
emails.body: I left him a couple of messages but never heard back. I will try to follow= up again today. Jim Buerkle 04/05/2001 08:19 AM
